ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the author */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Path to the author's profile image */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the author (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the author account is active */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the author's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ingredients" (
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ingredient */,
  "ingredient_name" TEXT /* Name of the ingredient */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or notes about the ingredient */,
  "is_organic" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is organic */,
  "is_gmo" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is genetically modified */,
  "is_allergen" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is a common allergen */,
  "is_vegan" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is vegan */,
  "is_vegetarian" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is vegetarian */,
  "is_gluten_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is gluten-free */,
  "is_dairy_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is dairy-free */,
  "is_nut_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is nut-free */,
  "is_soy_free" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is soy-free */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ingredient was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ingredient was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_ingredients" (
  "recipe_ingredient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe-ingredient relationship */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "ingredient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ingredient */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of the ingredient used */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., grams, cups, tbsp) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the ingredient */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient is optional */,
  "is_substitutable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the ingredient can be substituted */,
  "substitute_notes" TEXT /* Notes on possible substitutes for the ingredient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ingredient was added to the recipe */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the ingredient was last updated in the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_ingredient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_ingredients_ingredient_id FOREIGN KEY ("ingredient_id") REFERENCES ingredients ("ingredient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_instructions" (
  "instruction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instruction step */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the cooking process */,
  "instruction_text" TEXT /* Detailed instructions for the step */,
  "image" TEXT /* Path to an image that illustrates the step */,
  "video" TEXT /* Path to a video that demonstrates the step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instruction was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the instruction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instruction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the tag is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recipe_tags" (
  "recipe_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recipe-tag relationship */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recipe */,
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recipe_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recipe_tags_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("tag_id") REFERENCES tags ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, moderator, user) */,
  "profile_image" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is banned */,
  "banned_reason" TEXT /* Reason for banning the user */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* A brief description about the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* User's location */,
  "website" TEXT /* User's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "recipe_id" INTEGER /* ID of the favorite recipe */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date and time the recipe was added to favorites */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the recipe is pinned (high priority) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* User's notes or comments about the recipe */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_favorites_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
